content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach deploys the signature diagnostic question 'what are you not saying to each other?' in turn 2 — exactly the question the breakthrough condition specifies. The coach does not take 'we're fine' at face value, does not insist something is wrong, and uses feel-over-figure moves (tracking the body/voice: 'did it land as true, or did it land a little flat?', 'the pause before surprised — something moved there') that are signature AoA moves for surfacing the gap between report and felt experience. The 'isn't it?' reflection in turn 12 mirrors the client's question back rather than colluding or correcting — a clean AoA move. No CBT reframing, no IFS parts language, no pop-psych vocabulary. The coach is coaching FROM the methodology rather than talking about it. Frameworks like the-happiness-filter are not named (appropriately — naming too early would be evangelizing), but the read is being worked from.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Deploys the signature diagnostic 'what are you not saying?' at the right moment — when the client's report is suspiciously smooth."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Feel-over-figure: 'did it land as true, or did it land a little flat?' — tracking somatic truth rather than content."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Quality-of-presence inquiry — appropriate AoA move for surfacing the texture beneath the report."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'When did you last feel surprised by them?' — diagnostic question for aliveness vs. management; appropriate to context."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks the pause/body signal — classic AoA attention to what moved beneath the words."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the question back rather than answering — keeps the client with their own knowing."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Lets the client notice 'functional' on their own — does not name walking-on-eggshells prematurely, honoring the let-them-surface-it principle."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-happiness-filter", "lets-go-there", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "trigger", "walking-on-eggshells (appropriately not yet named)"],
  "notes": "The 'what are you defending?' question is not asked verbatim, but its function is served by the diagnostic 'what are you not saying?' and the somatic tracking. Coach correctly avoids evangelizing the work — no premature naming of walking-on-eggshells."
}
